text.title: Service Ownership Map Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when service-ownership-map-template is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Incident on Service X; nobody knows who owns it.

antipattern.reason: Linked artefacts moved; map not updated.
antipattern.note: Fix: CI check: validate URLs in catalog-info.yaml weekly.

antipattern.description: Service has 3 dependents but the team thinks it has 0.
antipattern.note: Fix: Generate dependency graph from Kubernetes / IaC / OTel data; cross-check with curated.
